leads.title: Co-Owner & Travel Advisor
leads.headline: Co-Owner & Travel Advisor
leads.company_description: Red Letter Travel is a United States-based luxury travel agency and Virtuoso member that provides personalized trip planning and white-glove concierge services. They serve discerning clients by creating custom itineraries, securing exclusive perks, and coordinating with on-ground partners to ensure comprehensive travel support.

leads.title: Owner, Managing Partner
leads.headline: Owner, Managing Partner
leads.company_description: Elli Travel Group is a United States-based boutique luxury travel agency that provides full-service, bespoke travel planning for individuals and groups. They specialize in 4-5 star hotel stays, adventure travel, expedition cruises, and escorted group tours, focusing on seamless logistics and exclusive amenities.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Founder & Managing Director at Ampersand Travel Limited
leads.company_address: B2, 82 Silverthorne Road, LONDON, Other SW8 3HE, GB
leads.company_description: Ampersand Travel is a United Kingdom-based luxury tour operator specializing in tailor-made holidays across the Indian Subcontinent, Southeast Asia, Southern Africa, and the British Isles. They serve high-profile clients by leveraging deep supplier relationships to curate authentic, exclusive cultural tours, wildlife adventures, and family trips.

leads.title: Owner and Founder
leads.company_description: North Shore Travel LLC is a United States-based full-service luxury travel consultancy that designs personalized, exclusive vacation experiences for individuals, families, and groups. They provide concierge-style planning services that go beyond standard flight and hotel reservations to deliver comprehensive, worry-free travel itineraries.

leads.title: Director And Founder, Momentum Experiences
leads.headline: Director And Founder, Momentum Experiences
leads.company_description: Momentum Experiences is a United Kingdom-based boutique travel advisor and tour operator that has specialized in bespoke winter holidays and year-round events since 1996. Operating from London, they provide curated, customized travel experiences for clients by leveraging extensive industry contacts to craft personalized, high-quality trips.

leads.company_description: TRIPorganiser Scotland is a United Kingdom-based tour operator staffed by local experts who specialize in planning comprehensive holidays throughout Scotland. They serve international visitors by managing all logistical aspects of travel, including accommodation selection and transportation, to ensure a seamless and relaxing vacation experience.

leads.title: CEO
leads.headline: CEO
leads.company_description: River and Green Ltd is a United Kingdom-based tour operator located in Scotland that specializes in designing tailor-made sporting vacations for high-end international clients. Their expertise focuses on creating bespoke itineraries for fishing, hunting, and golf, providing personalized travel experiences rather than mass-market offerings.

leads.title: Managing Director
leads.headline: Managing Director
leads.company_description: Outpost Overseas is a United Kingdom-based golf tour operator that creates curated, bespoke golf travel itineraries for discerning clients. Based in Scotland, the company provides personalized trip planning and dedicated support, recently expanding its service capabilities through the acquisition of Wilkinson Golf.

leads.company_description: Squaw Peak Travel is a United States-based, locally-owned travel agency in Massachusetts with over 43 years of industry experience. Their team of 12 agents provides personalized planning services for cruises, Disney vacations, all-inclusive resorts, and international escorted tours without charging service fees.

leads.company_description: Timeless Tours Ltd is a United Kingdom-based tour operator and travel agency headquartered in Kent. Established in 2011, the company specializes in providing curated destination experiences and fully-organized travel services for their clients.
